global_description: A small, agile songbird with a slender, streamlined body. It features a bright yellow plumage with an olive-green back and a distinctive black cap on its head. The bird has a thin, pointed beak and delicate legs.

part_details.head: Bright yellow with a distinctive black cap covering the crown.
part_details.body: Slender and streamlined, predominantly bright yellow with an olive-green back.
part_details.beak: Thin, pointed, and suitable for insectivorous feeding.
part_details.legs: Delicate and thin, supporting its small body.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the crown of the head.
The olive-green back transitions into the bright yellow body.
The thin beak protrudes from the front of the head.
